chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No. D – 17 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For orders on MA No.651/2025 3. For orders on MA No.652/2025 4. For hearing of main case 06.01.2026 On 07.10.2025, the following order was passed: “Learned counsel for the appellant seeks time to come prepared on the point of admission of this appeal. Time is granted and the matter is adjourned to 28.10.2025.” On 28.10.2025, the following order was passed: “Counsel for appellant seeks time for preparation. Time is allowed. To come up on 03.12.2025.” On 03.12.2025, the following order was passed: “Learned counsel for the appellant again seeks time to prepare with undertaking that he will not seek further time. Time is granted and the matter is adjourned to 06.01.2026.” Today, Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed Junejo, Advocate, holds brief for Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Counsel for the appellant, and merely requests for adjournment without any justifiable cause. The appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
